name: GIGABYTE B650I AORUS ULTRA Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C with DP-Alt - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2

description: Mini-ITX motherboard for AMD AM5 with DDR5, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for compact high-end builds.
